vocab.meaning: không phù hợp, xung đột (về thẩm mỹ)
vocab.example: Initially, I was worried the vintage watch might clash with my modern wardrobe, but it actually adds a unique flair.

vocab.meaning: trông rất sang trọng, tuyệt vời
vocab.example: When I put on that gift for the first time, it made me feel like I looked a million dollars.

vocab.meaning: thêm vào đó (thường là điều tốt nhất hoặc cuối cùng trong một chuỗi sự kiện)
vocab.example: I had a wonderful graduation dinner, and to crown it all, my uncle presented me with a stunning Swiss watch.

vocab.meaning: giữ vẻ mặt thản nhiên (khi cố giấu sự ngạc nhiên hoặc xúc động)
vocab.example: I could hardly keep a straight face when I saw the luxury brand logo on the gift box; I was shaking with excitement.
The sophisticated gold watch I received is a far cry from the plastic digital ones I used to wear as a teenager.

vocab.meaning: được đặt ở vị trí trang trọng nhất
vocab.example: That watch now takes pride of place on my bedside table because of its deep sentimental connection.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt bậc, làm nhiều hơn mong đợi
vocab.example: My friends really went the extra mile to find a limited-edition watch that perfectly matched my personality.
I love functional gifts; the smartwatch I got last Christmas is a case in point as I use it every single day.

vocab.meaning: tạo nên bầu không khí hoặc phong cách chủ đạo
vocab.example: Receiving such a formal gift really set the tone for my transition into a more professional phase of life.
I felt quite guilty receiving it, knowing that a timepiece of that caliber must have cost a fortune.
